에스겔 21:1.content: Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

에스겔 21:2.content: “Son of man, set your face toward Jerusalem, and preach toward the sanctuaries, and prophesy against the land of Israel.

에스겔 21:3.content: Tell the land of Israel, ‘Yahweh says: “Behold, I am against you, and will draw my sword out of its sheath, and will cut off from you the righteous and the wicked.

에스겔 21:4.content: Seeing then that I will cut off from you the righteous and the wicked, therefore my sword will go out of its sheath against all flesh from the south to the north.

에스겔 21:5.content: All flesh will know that I, Yahweh, have drawn my sword out of its sheath. It will not return any more.” ’

에스겔 21:6.content: “Therefore sigh, you son of man. You shall sigh before their eyes with a broken heart and with bitterness.

에스겔 21:7.content: It shall be, when they ask you, ‘Why do you sigh?’ that you shall say, ‘Because of the news, for it comes! Every heart will melt, all hands will be feeble, every spirit will faint, and all knees will be weak as water. Behold, it comes, and it shall be done, says the Lord Yahweh.’ ”

에스겔 21:8.content: Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

에스겔 21:9.content: “Son of man, prophesy, and say, ‘Yahweh says: “A sword! A sword! It is sharpened, and also polished.

에스겔 21:10.content: It is sharpened that it may make a slaughter. It is polished that it may be as lightning. Should we then make mirth? The rod of my son condemns every tree.

에스겔 21:11.content: It is given to be polished, that it may be handled. The sword is sharpened. Yes, it is polished to give it into the hand of the killer.” ’

에스겔 21:12.content: Cry and wail, son of man; for it is on my people. It is on all the princes of Israel. They are delivered over to the sword with my people. Therefore beat your thigh.

에스겔 21:13.content: “For there is a trial. What if even the rod that condemns will be no more?” says the Lord Yahweh.

에스겔 21:14.content: “You therefore, son of man, prophesy, and strike your hands together. Let the sword be doubled the third time, the sword of the fatally wounded. It is the sword of the great one who is fatally wounded, which enters into their rooms.

에스겔 21:15.content: I have set the threatening sword against all their gates, that their heart may melt, and their stumblings be multiplied. Ah! It is made as lightning. It is pointed for slaughter.

에스겔 21:16.content: Gather yourselves together. Go to the right. Set yourselves in array. Go to the left, wherever your face is set.

에스겔 21:17.content: I will also strike my hands together, and I will cause my wrath to rest. I, Yahweh, have spoken it.”

에스겔 21:18.content: Yahweh’s word came to me again, saying,

에스겔 21:19.content: “Also, you son of man, appoint two ways, that the sword of the king of Babylon may come. They both will come out of one land, and mark out a place. Mark it out at the head of the way to the city.

에스겔 21:20.content: You shall appoint a way for the sword to come to Rabbah of the children of Ammon, and to Judah in Jerusalem the fortified.

에스겔 21:21.content: For the king of Babylon stood at the parting of the way, at the head of the two ways, to use divination. He shook the arrows back and forth. He consulted the teraphim. He looked in the liver.

에스겔 21:22.content: In his right hand was the lot for Jerusalem, to set battering rams, to open the mouth in the slaughter, to lift up the voice with shouting, to set battering rams against the gates, to cast up mounds, and to build forts.

에스겔 21:23.content: It will be to them as a false divination in their sight, who have sworn oaths to them; but he brings iniquity to memory, that they may be taken.

에스겔 21:24.content: “Therefore the Lord Yahweh says: ‘Because you have caused your iniquity to be remembered, in that your transgressions are uncovered, so that in all your doings your sins appear; because you have come to memory, you will be taken with the hand.

에스겔 21:25.content: “ ‘You, deadly wounded wicked one, the prince of Israel, whose day has come, in the time of the iniquity of the end,

에스겔 21:26.content: the Lord Yahweh says: “Remove the turban, and take off the crown. This will not be as it was. Exalt that which is low, and humble that which is high.

에스겔 21:27.content: I will overturn, overturn, overturn it. This also will be no more, until he comes whose right it is; and I will give it.” ’

에스겔 21:28.content: “You, son of man, prophesy, and say, ‘The Lord Yahweh says this concerning the children of Ammon, and concerning their reproach: “A sword! A sword is drawn! It is polished for the slaughter, to cause it to devour, that it may be as lightning;

에스겔 21:29.content: while they see for you false visions, while they divine lies to you, to lay you on the necks of the wicked who are deadly wounded, whose day has come in the time of the iniquity of the end.

에스겔 21:30.content: Cause it to return into its sheath. In the place where you were created, in the land of your birth, I will judge you.

에스겔 21:31.content: I will pour out my indignation on you. I will blow on you with the fire of my wrath. I will deliver you into the hand of brutish men, skillful to destroy.

에스겔 21:32.content: You will be for fuel to the fire. Your blood will be in the middle of the land. You will be remembered no more; for I, Yahweh, have spoken it.” ’ ”
